source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/2023 시험소 규격업데이트/A1417, A1717, F1417/EMC 접수자료 231218/5. Test plan/2G Detector Test plan 231023.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Test plan for EMC testing of A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector models.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents recommended minimum test plan contents, including equipment identification, intended use, EMC pass/fail criteria, sample configuration, power input, grounding, accessories, and test setup information.
keyPoints: The products are Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detectors intended for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children.
The products are not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.
The EMC emissions compliance classification is Group 1 Class A.
Each model has one sample to be tested.
The equipment will be tested as table-top equipment.

evidence.claim: The test facility is Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. 155 & 159, Osan-Ro, Mohyeon-Myeon, Cheoin-Gu, Yongin-Si, Gyeonggi-Do 16885 KOREA, REPUBLIC OF

evidence.claim: The equipment under test is a Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector with models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name : Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector Model : A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The detector models are indicated for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children.
evidence.evidenceText: A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector are indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

evidence.claim: The detector models are intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems and support more precise diagnosis and treatment planning in real time.
evidence.evidenceText: It is intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems and provide more precise case diagnosis and treatment planning on a real time basis for physicians and radiologists.

evidence.claim: The detector models are not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.

evidence.claim: The software version of the tested sample is V2.0 and hardware version is R0.
evidence.evidenceText: Software version : V2.0 Hardware version : R0
evidence.pageTarget: A1417MCW A1717MCW F1417MCW Software and Hardware Versions

evidence.claim: The number of samples to be tested is one unit of each model.
evidence.evidenceText: Number of samples to be tested : 1 EA of each model (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)

evidence.claim: Deviations from basic EMC standards or the collateral standard are marked not applicable.
evidence.evidenceText: Deviations from the Basic EMC standards or from this collateral standard ... N/A

evidence.claim: Tests that will not be performed are marked not applicable.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicability / tests that will not be performed ... N/A

evidence.claim: The emissions compliance class and group is Group 1 Class A.
evidence.evidenceText: IMMUNITY TEST LEVELS for each IMMUNITY test and EMISSIONS compliance class and group ... Group 1 Class A

evidence.claim: Immunity pass/fail criteria include normal operation when required, consistent power supply connection, normal operation of the manufacturer program, and intended image pixel size.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation normally when operation is required Connected consistently to POWER SUPPLY when EMC test is performed. When connected to POWER SUPPLY, program provided by manufacturer is operated normally. Image pixel size is obtained as intended.

evidence.claim: The operating mode uses the provided program and continuous ping signal access.
evidence.evidenceText: Use provided program Access ping signal continuously.

evidence.claim: Power solution number 1 has input 100-240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 1.0 A and output D.C. 16 V, 3 A.
evidence.evidenceText: Power solution #1 : INPUT : 100 - 240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 1.0 A OUTPUT : D.C. 16 V, 3 A

evidence.claim: Power solution number 2 has input 100-240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 1.0 A and output D.C. 15 V, 6 A.
evidence.evidenceText: Power solution #2 : INPUT : 100 - 240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 1.0 A OUTPUT : D.C. 15 V, 6 A

evidence.claim: The Power Supply Box earth ground terminal is to be connected securely to facility ground with a cable.
evidence.evidenceText: Connect the Earth GND terminal of the Power Supply Box to the facility ground securely with a cable

evidence.claim: The ME equipment will be tested as table-top equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: ME EQUIPMENT will be tested as table-top.
evidence.pageTarget: Table Top ME Equipment EMC Testing

evidence.claim: Data is transmitted and received between the Detector and the PC in accordance with the Ethernet standard.
evidence.evidenceText: Data is transmitted and received between the Detector and the PC in accordance with the Ethernet standard.

evidence.claim: Accessories and auxiliary equipment include Power Supply Box, Main adaptor, Battery Pack, MainCable, and Gender Cable.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Supply Box: Source of necessary electricity Main adaptor : Source of necessary electricity Battery Pack: Source for wireless connection MainCable: To connect X-ray detector with Power Supply Box Gender Cable : To connect X-ray detector with Main adaptor
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector Accessories

evidence.claim: The special software needed to perform the tests is SDXAcq Program.
evidence.evidenceText: Documentation of any special ME EQUIPMENT or ME SYSTEM hardware or software needed to perform the Tests ... SDXAcq Program

evidence.claim: Planned ESD test points will be shown by photo and recorded to the test report.
evidence.evidenceText: Offer the photo showing the test points and will be recorded to test report.
